form.label: gpu-insights-otel: Inference TCO & Efficiency
form.description: Real-time correlation of NVIDIA DCGM hardware metrics with LLM Token throughput via OpenTelemetry.

search.query: index=ai_infrastructure_metrics cluster=$cluster_select$ sourcetype="otel:nvidia:dcgm" OR sourcetype="llm:inference" | stats avg(tokens_per_second) as avg_tps, avg(power_draw_kw) as avg_kw, avg(gpu_utilization) as avg_util | eval IES = avg_tps / (avg_kw * (avg_util/100)) | table IES

panel.title: TCO: Cost per 1K Tokens vs. Power Draw

search.query: index=ai_infrastructure_metrics cluster=$cluster_select$ | timechart avg(cost_per_1k_tokens) as Token_Cost, avg(power_draw_kw) as Power_KW

panel.title: Thermal Throttling Impact on Generation Latency

search.query: index=ai_infrastructure_metrics cluster=$cluster_select$ sourcetype="otel:nvidia:dcgm" | eval is_throttling = if(gpu_temp > 85, 1, 0) | timechart avg(generation_latency_ms) as Latency_MS by is_throttling
